revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Special pages list]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Special pages list]]</includeonly>

{| class="wikitable floatright" style="text-align: center; font-size: 85%" ! [[Special:Specialpages|Special pages]] ([[Help:Special page#Maintenance|maintenance]]) !! Information |- | [[Special:BrokenRedirects|Broken redirects]] || |- | [[Special:DeadendPages|Dead-end pages]] || [[Wikipedia:dead-end pages|Dead-end pages]] |- | [[Special:AncientPages|Dormant pages]] || [[Wikipedia:Database reports/Forgotten articles|Forgotten articles]] |- | [[Special:DoubleRedirects|Double redirects]] || [[Wikipedia:Double redirects|Double redirects]] |- | [[Special:LonelyPages|Lonely pages]] || [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Orphanage|Orphaned articles]] |- | [[Special:LongPages|Long pages]] || |- | [[Special:NewPages|New pages]] || [[Wikipedia:New pages patrol|New pages patrol]] |- | [[Special:NewPagesFeed|New pages feed]] || [[Wikipedia:Page Curation|Page curation]] |- | [[Special:ProtectedPages|Protected pages]] || [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|Protection policy]] |- | [[Special:ShortPages|Short pages]] || |- | [[Special:UncategorizedPages|Uncategorized pages]] || [[Wikipedia:Categorization|Categorization]] |- | [[Wikipedia:Database reports/Uncategorized categories|Uncategorized categories]] || |- | [[Special:UncategorizedTemplates|Uncategorized templates]] || |- | [[Special:UnusedCategories|Unused categories]] || |- | [[Special:UnusedFiles|Unused files (images)]] || |- | [[Special:UnusedTemplates|Unused templates]] || |- | [[Special:WithoutInterwiki|Without interwiki links]] || |- | [[Special:MostInterwikis|Most interwiki links]] || |- | [[Special:WantedPages|Wanted pages]] || |- | [[Wikipedia:Most-wanted articles|Most-wanted articles]] || |- | colspan="2" | ''See also: '''[[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance departments]]''' '' |}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
revision.text: {| class="wikitable floatright" style="text-align: center; font-size: 85%" ! [[Special:Specialpages|Special pages]] ([[Help:Special page#Maintenance|maintenance]]) !! Information |- | [[Special:BrokenRedirects|Broken redirects]] || |- | [[Special:DeadendPages|Dead-end pages]] || [[Wikipedia:dead-end pages|Dead-end pages]] |- | [[Special:AncientPages|Dormant pages]] || [[Wikipedia:Database reports/Forgotten articles|Forgotten articles]] |- | [[Special:DoubleRedirects|Double redirects]] || [[Wikipedia:Double redirects|Double redirects]] |- | [[Special:LonelyPages|Lonely pages]] || [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Orphanage|Orphaned articles]] |- | [[Special:LongPages|Long pages]] || |- | [[Special:NewPages|New pages]] || [[Wikipedia:New pages patrol|New pages patrol]] |- | [[Special:NewPagesFeed|New pages feed]] || [[Wikipedia:Page Curation|Page curation]] |- | [[Special:ProtectedPages|Protected pages]] || [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|Protection policy]] |- | [[Special:ShortPages|Short pages]] || |- | [[Special:UncategorizedPages|Uncategorized pages]] || [[Wikipedia:Categorization|Categorization]] |- | [[Wikipedia:Database reports/Uncategorized categories|Uncategorized categories]] || |- | [[Special:UncategorizedTemplates|Uncategorized templates]] || |- | [[Special:UnusedCategories|Unused categories]] || |- | [[Special:UnusedFiles|Unused files (images)]] || |- | [[Special:UnusedTemplates|Unused templates]] || |- | [[Special:WithoutInterwiki|Without interwiki links]] || |- | [[Special:MostInterwikis|Most interwiki links]] || |- | [[Special:WantedPages|Wanted pages]] || |- | [[Wikipedia:Most-wanted articles|Most-wanted articles]] || |- | colspan="2" | ''See also: '''[[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance departments]]''' '' |}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: {| class="wikitable floatright" style="text-align: center; font-size: 85%" ! [[Special:Specialpages|Special pages]] ([[Help:Special page#Maintenance|maintenance]]) !! revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{| class="wikitable floatright" style="text-align: center; font-size: 85%" ! [[Special:Specialpages|Special pages]] ([[Help:Special page#Maintenance|maintenance]]) !! Information |- | [[Special:BrokenRedirects|Broken redirects]] || |- | [[Special:DeadendPages|Dead-end pages]] || [[Wikipedia:dead-end pages|Dead-end pages]] |- | [[Special:AncientPages|Dormant pages]] || [[Wikipedia:Database reports/Forgotten articles|Forgotten articles]] |- | [[Special:DoubleRedirects|Double redirects]] || [[Wikipedia:Double redirects|Double redirects]] |- | [[Special:LonelyPages|Lonely pages]] || [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Orphanage|Orphaned articles]] |- | [[Special:LongPages|Long pages]] || |- | [[Special:NewPages|New pages]] || [[Wikipedia:New pages patrol|New pages patrol]] |- | [[Special:NewPagesFeed|New pages feed]] || [[Wikipedia:Page Curation|Page curation]] |- | [[Special:ProtectedPages|Protected pages]] || [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|Protection policy]] |- | [[Special:ShortPages|Short pages]] || |- | [[Special:UncategorizedPages|Uncategorized pages]] || [[Wikipedia:Categorization|Categorization]] |- | [[Wikipedia:Database reports/Uncategorized categories|Uncategorized categories]] || |- | [[Special:UncategorizedTemplates|Uncategorized templates]] || |- | [[Special:UnusedCategories|Unused categories]] || |- | [[Special:UnusedFiles|Unused files (images)]] || |- | [[Special:UnusedTemplates|Unused templates]] || |- | [[Special:WithoutInterwiki|Without interwiki links]] || |- | [[Special:MostInterwikis|Most interwiki links]] || |- | [[Special:WantedPages|Wanted pages]] || |- | [[Wikipedia:Most-wanted articles|Most-wanted articles]] || |- | colspan="2" | ''See also: '''[[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance departments]]''' '' |}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{| class="wikitable floatright" style="text-align: center; font-size: 85%" ! [[Special:Specialpages|Special pages]] ([[Help:Special page#Maintenance|maintenance]]) !! Information |- | [[Special:BrokenRedirects|Broken redirects]] || |- | [[Special:DeadendPages|Dead-end pages]] || [[Wikipedia:dead-end pages|Dead-end pages]] |- | [[Special:AncientPages|Dormant pages]] || [[Wikipedia:Database reports/Forgotten articles|Forgotten articles]] |- | [[Special:DoubleRedirects|Double redirects]] || [[Wikipedia:Double redirects|Double redirects]] |- | [[Special:LonelyPages|Lonely pages]] || [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Orphanage|Orphaned articles]] |- | [[Special:LongPages|Long pages]] || |- | [[Special:NewPages|New pages]] || [[Wikipedia:New pages patrol|New pages patrol]] |- | [[Special:NewPagesFeed|New pages feed]] || [[Wikipedia:Page Curation|Page curation]] |- | [[Special:ProtectedPages|Protected pages]] || [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|Protection policy]] |- | [[Special:ShortPages|Short pages]] || |- | [[Special:UncategorizedPages|Uncategorized pages]] || [[Wikipedia:Categorization|Categorization]] |- | [[Wikipedia:Database reports/Uncategorized categories|Uncategorized categories]] || |- | [[Special:UncategorizedTemplates|Uncategorized templates]] || |- | [[Special:UnusedCategories|Unused categories]] || |- | [[Special:UnusedFiles|Unused files (images)]] || |- | [[Special:UnusedTemplates|Unused templates]] || |- | [[Special:WithoutInterwiki|Without interwiki links]] || |- | [[Special:MostInterwikis|Most interwiki links]] || |- | [[Special:WantedPages|Wanted pages]] || |- | [[Wikipedia:Most-wanted articles|Most-wanted articles]] || |- | colspan="2" | ''See also: '''[[Wikipedia:Maintenance|Maintenance departments]]''' '' |}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
